'''âm-h-z''' ('''mahaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quahog|quahog]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quahog|quahog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-h-z
|-
! Lemma
| mahaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mahazithi|mahazithi]] || [[word:mahaziji|mahaziji]] || [[word:mahazishi|mahazishi]] || [[word:mahazi|mahazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mahazuthuth|mahazuthuth]] || [[word:mahazujuj|mahazujuj]] || [[word:mahazushush|mahazushush]] || [[word:mahaz|mahaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mahazuthu|mahazuthu]] || [[word:mahazuju|mahazuju]] || [[word:mahazushu|mahazushu]] || [[word:mahazu|mahazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mahazufuth|mahazufuth]] || [[word:mahazufuj|mahazufuj]] || [[word:mahazufush|mahazufush]] || [[word:mahazuf|mahazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mahazethe|mahazethe]] || [[word:mahazeje|mahazeje]] || [[word:mahazeshe|mahazeshe]] || [[word:mahaze|mahaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mahazothoth|mahazothoth]] || [[word:mahazojoj|mahazojoj]] || [[word:mahazoshosh|mahazoshosh]] || [[word:mahaz|mahaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mahazotho|mahazotho]] || [[word:mahazojo|mahazojo]] || [[word:mahazosho|mahazosho]] || [[word:mahazo|mahazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mahazofoth|mahazofoth]] || [[word:mahazofoj|mahazofoj]] || [[word:mahazofosh|mahazofosh]] || [[word:mahazof|mahazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mahazĂŠthĂŠ|mahazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mahazĂŠjĂŠ|mahazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mahazĂŠshĂŠ|mahazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mahazĂŠ|mahazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mahazathath|mahazathath]] || [[word:mahazajaj|mahazajaj]] || [[word:mahazashash|mahazashash]] || [[word:mahaz|mahaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mahazatha|mahazatha]] || [[word:mahazaja|mahazaja]] || [[word:mahazasha|mahazasha]] || [[word:mahaza|mahaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mahazafath|mahazafath]] || [[word:mahazafaj|mahazafaj]] || [[word:mahazafash|mahazafash]] || [[word:mahazaf|mahazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mahazasha|mahazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomahazasha|gomahazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimahazasha|gokimahazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mahaznĂŒsha|mahaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomahaznknĂŒsha|gomahaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimahaznĂŒsha|gokimahaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mahazshĂ«sha|mahazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomahaznkshĂ«sha|gomahaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimahazshĂ«sha|gokimahazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mahazrosha|mahazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomahaznkrosha|gomahaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimahazrosha|gokimahazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mahazmusha|mahazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomahaznkmusha|gomahaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahazmusha|gokimahazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mahazsherasha|mahazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomahaznksherasha|gomahaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimahazsherasha|gokimahazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mahazngasha|mahazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomahaznkngasha|gomahaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimahazngasha|gokimahazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mahazyasha|mahazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomahaznkyasha|gomahaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimahazyasha|gokimahazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mahazyamasha|mahazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomahaznkyamasha|gomahaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimahazyamasha|gokimahazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mahaznĂŒshĂ«sha|mahaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomahaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomahaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimahaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimahaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mahaznĂŒrosha|mahaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomahaznknĂŒrosha|gomahaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimahaznĂŒrosha|gokimahaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahaznĂŒmusha|mahaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomahaznknĂŒmusha|gomahaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahaznĂŒmusha|gokimahaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mahazshĂ«nĂŒsha|mahazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomahaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomahaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimahazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimahazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mahazshĂ«rosha|mahazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomahaznkshĂ«rosha|gomahaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimahazshĂ«rosha|gokimahazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahazshĂ«musha|mahazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomahaznkshĂ«musha|gomahaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahazshĂ«musha|gokimahazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mahazronĂŒsha|mahazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomahaznkronĂŒsha|gomahaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimahazronĂŒsha|gokimahazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mahazroshĂ«sha|mahazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomahaznkroshĂ«sha|gomahaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimahazroshĂ«sha|gokimahazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mahazromusha|mahazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomahaznkromusha|gomahaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimahazromusha|gokimahazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mahazmunĂŒsha|mahazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomahaznkmunĂŒsha|gomahaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimahazmunĂŒsha|gokimahazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mahazmushĂ«sha|mahazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomahaznkmushĂ«sha|gomahaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimahazmushĂ«sha|gokimahazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mahazmurosha|mahazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomahaznkmurosha|gomahaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimahazmurosha|gokimahazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mahaz|mahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠhĂŠz|mĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homahaz|homahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠhĂŠz|homĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomahaz|hohomahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠhĂŠz|hohomĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmahaz|nĂŒmahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠhĂŠz|nĂŒmĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmahaz|nĂŒnĂŒmahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠhĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmahaz|nĂŻmahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠhĂŠz|nĂŻmĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmahaz|nĂŻnĂŻmahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠhĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumahaz|lumahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠhĂŠz|lumĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumahaz|lulumahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠhĂŠz|lulumĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limahaz|limahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠhĂŠz|limĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimahaz|lilimahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠhĂŠz|lilimĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komahaz|komahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠhĂŠz|komĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomahaz|kokomahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠhĂŠz|kokomĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemahaz|kemahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠhĂŠz|kemĂŠhĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemahaz|kekemahaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠhĂŠz|kekemĂŠhĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
